title: Verify manage trial entry point shows Trial Corner flow
description: Test that clicking 'Manage Trial' in settings navigates to the new Trial Corner flow instead of old interface
preconditions: Manage Trial option exists in settings

steps.description: 1. Log in with trial user account
2. Navigate to Manage Trial section (from settings or profile)

expected_result: User sees Trial Corner flow with all 5 sections, not the old Manage Trial interface
